narrative:
Pebble Twp (precinct in Pike County) has 1,506 registered voters, with 62.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a clear Republican lean of 6.6 percentage points.
